message:
fix: use random encryption key for federation credentials (bd-rv8g)

Replace predictable SHA256(dbPath) key derivation with a randomly-generated
32-byte key stored in .beads-credential-key (0600 permissions). Existing
credentials are automatically migrated from the old key on first startup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/mica
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
